member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Clients.InMemoryPlcClient
member.summary: Provides an in-memory PLC client implementation for tests, demos, and simulator foundations.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Clients.InMemoryPlcClient.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Clients.InMemoryPlcClient.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Clients.InMemoryPlcClient.Memory
member.summary: Gets the in-memory PLC memory store.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Clients.PlcClientBase
member.summary: Provides a base implementation for PLC clients.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Clients.PlcClientBase.ConnectCoreAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the concrete PLC transport.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Clients.PlcClientBase.DisconnectCoreAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disconnects from the concrete PLC transport.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Clients.PlcClientBase.ReadBitsCoreAsync(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads bit values from the concrete PLC transport.
member.param: The number of bits to read.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Clients.PlcClientBase.ReadWordsCoreAsync(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads word values from the concrete PLC transport.
member.param: The number of words to read.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Clients.PlcClientBase.WriteBitsCoreAsync(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes bit values to the concrete PLC transport.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Clients.PlcClientBase.WriteWordsCoreAsync(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Int16},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes word values to the concrete PLC transport.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Clients.PlcClientBase.SetState(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Connections.PlcConnectionState)
member.summary: Changes the connection state and raises the state changed event.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Devices.DefaultPlcAddressParser
member.summary: Provides the default PLC address parser.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Extensions.PlcClientExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for PLC clients.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Extensions.PlcClientExtensions.ReadBitsAsync(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient,Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcReadRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads bit values by using a PLC read request.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Extensions.PlcClientExtensions.ReadWordsAsync(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient,Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcReadRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads word values by using a PLC read request.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Extensions.PlcClientExtensions.WriteBitsAsync(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient,Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcWriteBitRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes bit values by using a PLC bit write request.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Extensions.PlcClientExtensions.WriteWordsAsync(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient,Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcWriteWordRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes word values by using a PLC word write request.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Internal.AsyncLock
member.summary: Provides an async-compatible lock primitive.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Internal.AsyncLock.LockAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enters the asynchronous lock.
member.returns: A disposable releaser that exits the lock when disposed.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory
member.summary: Provides an in-memory PLC device memory store.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory.ReadBits(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads bit values from the memory store.
member.param: The number of bits to read.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory.ReadWords(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reads word values from the memory store.
member.param: The number of words to read.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory.WriteBits(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Writes bit values to the memory store.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory.WriteWords(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Int16})
member.summary: Writes word values to the memory store.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory.Clear
member.summary: Clears all memory areas.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorClientOptions
member.summary: Defines TCP PLC simulator client options.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorClientOptions.Host
member.summary: Gets or sets the remote host.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorClientOptions.Port
member.summary: Gets or sets the remote port.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorClientOptions.ConnectTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the connect timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorProtocol
member.summary: Provides helpers for the Dreamine PLC simulator line protocol.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorProtocol.ReadBits
member.summary: The read bit command name.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorProtocol.ReadWords
member.summary: The read word command name.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorProtocol.WriteBits
member.summary: The write bit command name.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorProtocol.WriteWords
member.summary: The write word command name.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorProtocol.Ok(System.String)
member.summary: Builds a successful response line.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorProtocol.Error(System.String)
member.summary: Builds a failure response line.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorProtocol.FormatBits(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Converts bit values to a protocol payload.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorProtocol.FormatWords(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int16})
member.summary: Converts word values to a protocol payload.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorProtocol.ParseBits(System.String)
member.summary: Parses bit values from a protocol payload.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorProtocol.ParseWords(System.String)
member.summary: Parses word values from a protocol payload.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorProtocol.ReadOkPayload(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the OK payload from a response line.
member.exception: Thrown when the response is an error response.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServer
member.summary: Provides a lightweight TCP PLC simulator server for samples and cross-PC tests.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServer.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServerOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServer.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServerOptions,Dreamine.PLC.Core.Memory.InMemoryPlcMemory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: E:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServer.StatusChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the server status changes.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServer.IsRunning
member.summary: Gets whether the simulator server is running.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServer.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the TCP simulator server.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServer.StopAsync
member.summary: Stops the TCP simulator server.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServerOptions
member.summary: Defines TCP PLC simulator server options.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServerOptions.Host
member.summary: Gets or sets the server bind address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServerOptions.Port
member.summary: Gets or sets the server port.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServerOptions.EnableAutoWordResponse
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the simulator writes an automatic response word after a trigger word is written.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServerOptions.AutoResponseTriggerAddress
member.summary: Gets or sets the trigger word address for the automatic response test.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServerOptions.AutoResponseAddress
member.summary: Gets or sets the response word address for the automatic response test.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorServerOptions.AutoResponseIncrement
member.summary: Gets or sets the value increment used by the automatic response test.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorTcpClient
member.summary: Provides an implementation for the Dreamine TCP PLC simulator protocol.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorTcpClient.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Core.Simulation.PlcSimulatorClientOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Validation.PlcValidation
member.summary: Provides common PLC request validation helpers.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Validation.PlcValidation.ValidateCount(System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates a PLC read or write count.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Validation.PlcValidation.ValidateAddress(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress)
member.summary: Validates a PLC address.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Validation.PlcValidation.ValidateWordValues(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Int16})
member.summary: Validates PLC word values.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Core.Validation.PlcValidation.ValidateBitValues(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Validates PLC bit values.
